title: The Art of War
author: Sun Tzu
description: Apply ancient strategic wisdom to modern challenges with 4 skills drawn from history's most influential military treatise.
longDescription: Sun Tzu's The Art of War has guided strategists for over 2,500 years with its timeless principles of planning, positioning, and adaptation. Far beyond military tactics, its lessons apply to business competition, project leadership, and personal decision-making. These four skills translate Sun Tzu's core teachings into practical frameworks for assessing situations strategically, positioning yourself advantageously, adapting tactics fluidly, and gathering the intelligence you need to win.
